features.name: mux_whitebox_with_specify
features.description: Code should include a combinatorial multiplexer module with both a specify block for timing constraints and whitebox synthesis attributes, where one data input is unconnected while others drive 1'bx
features.snippet: (* abc9_box, lib_whitebox *) module CC_MX4(input D0, input D1, input D2, input D3, input S0, input S1, output Y); specify (D0 => Y) = 453; (D1 => Y) = 449; (D2 => Y) = 488; (D3 => Y) = 484; (S0 => Y) = 422; (S1 => Y) = 385; endspecify assign Y = S1 ? (S0 ? D3 : D2) : (S0 ? D1 : D0); endmodule

features.name: mux_empty_brace_unconnected_input
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer construct where one data input is explicitly unconnected using empty braces while other inputs are driven to 1'bx
